input.hiring_signal_brief: Recently hired two backend engineers, but engineering team still under 20.
input.bench_summary: 3 senior full-stack engineers available for 4–6 week engagements.
input.pricing_policy: No fixed rates; pricing based on role seniority and engagement length. Never quote per-hour or per-engineer rates in outreach.

candidate_output: We can deploy two senior full-stack engineers at $1,200/day to accelerate your API roadmap—no long-term commitment needed.
